evals.prompt: Please QC this fine-tuning chat dataset and tell me if it is safe to train on. Use the files in examples/.
evals.expected_output: Runs the full QC workflow, flags leakage, exact duplicates, PII, chat role/empty assistant issues, special tokens, and produces a markdown report.
expectations: The report includes a summary table with severities.
The report flags exact cross-split leakage as CRITICAL.

evals.prompt: Audit this DPO dataset for preference-pair bugs: examples/preference.jsonl
evals.expected_output: Runs preference-pair checks and flags chosen==rejected, conflicting prompt pairs, and length bias or manual verification needs.
expectations: Manual review samples are surfaced without pretending to judge semantic quality.

evals.prompt: Validate this classification fine-tune CSV and check labels: examples/classification.csv
evals.expected_output: Runs classification checks and flags label normalization and balance issues when present.
expectations: The report flags label normalization drift.
